oauthPurpose: Prepare for a future owner-approved Instagram OAuth connection that can verify account identity and connection metadata for draft-mode workflow readiness only.

requestedPermissions.purpose: Verify Instagram professional account identity and basic account metadata when using Instagram API with Instagram Login.

fallbackPermissionPath.purpose: Read basic Instagram professional account metadata.
Find the Facebook Page relationship required to locate the connected Instagram professional account.

rollbackPlan: Mark Instagram connection status as revoked or disconnected in AG OS records.
Revert Social Media Management System UI state to not_connected and draft_only.
Revoke app access in owner-controlled Meta or Instagram settings where available.
Remove or rotate any credential from the approved secure credential store.
Write audit and connector result records.
Keep posting, scheduling, analytics, DMs/comments, and n8n activation blocked unless separately approved.
stopConditions: Approval lock is missing, expired, revoked, or scope-mismatched.
OAuth would start during readiness work.
A credential or token would be copied into AG OS or GitHub.
Meta requests publishing, scheduling, analytics, comments, messages, ads, webhooks, or broader permissions without a new approval.
Domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears.
Validation, dashboard check, boot check, tests, or security scan fails.
auditRequirements: connector execution result for any future attempt
proof that prohibited actions remained blocked
